composition_pattern: internal-slide-removal -> slide-reorder -> correction-log-application -> public-table-rebuild -> style-migration -> speaker-note-cleanup

reference_sources.title: CISA cyber tabletop exercise material pattern
reference_sources.usage: Used only as structural inspiration for public cyber exercise sections; task facts and deck content are synthetic.

user_task_description: Prepare a clean public after-action briefing deck from a messy internal port cyber tabletop exercise presentation.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Remove internal slides and confidential notes, reorder public slides, apply correction-log fixes, rebuild public timeline/decision/impact/recovery sections, migrate public style, and preserve only public speaker notes.
atomic_scope: Only the requested presentation-wide workflow edits are in scope; public tabletop facts, correction facts, speaker notes, slide order, and style requirements must be preserved.
expected_output_type: A revised .pptx artifact that completes the requested single-presentation workflow.

slide_titles: Port Azure Cyber Tabletop Exercise: Public After-Action Briefing

style.footer_text: Port Azure Public After-Action Briefing | August 2026

Port Azure Cyber Tabletop Exercise: Publ: Prepared for the Port Resilience Committee
Exercise Scope: Scenario: degraded terminal scheduling and public communications pressure
Scope includes Terminal 2 gate scheduling, appointment restoration, and external communications.
Scope excludes threat attribution and confidential law-enforcement actions.
Public Communications: Customer advisory banner remained active until appointment restoration.
Next public dashboard update scheduled for 2026-08-10
After-Action Commitments: Reduce public update approval path to 20 minutes
Run manual gate scheduling drill each quarter

Incident Timeline: Phishing report escalated to security operations
Crane PLC monitoring shifted to manual confirmation
Decision Log: Shift gate scheduling to manual queue
Maintain container release while systems are validated
Recovery Priorities: Validate identity reset for port staff
Compress public update approval path to 20 minutes

speaker_notes: Open with the public after-action frame and confirm the deck excludes confidential investigative details.
Clarify what was included in the exercise scope and what remains outside public disclosure.
Walk through the corrected public timeline, including Terminal 2 and the 11:05 update.
Explain decisions in operational terms without assigning blame or naming vendors.
Summarize public impacts with corrected 47-minute gate scheduling duration.
Highlight the 24-hour recovery target through the listed recovery priorities.
Describe communications improvements and the next public dashboard update.
Close with the four public commitments and owners.
